---
name: hmpps-template-sync
description: >
  Applies changes from the hmpps-template-typescript shared template to this repository.
  Use this agent to list available template changes, inspect a specific change, or apply
  a selected change to the current working directory.
tools:
  - github/get_pull_request
  - github/get_pull_request_files
---

Use the `/hmpps-template-sync` skill to complete all tasks.
